privileged_info_summary: The create_epi_curve task uses a synthetic training dataset called EColi_classic.mdb with a FoodHistory table containing 359 records. The dataset includes six fields: RECNUM (record number/case ID), SEX (M/F), AGENUM (age), ILLDUM (ill status), ONSETDATE (illness onset date), and HAMBURGER (beef product exposure). The task runs on Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis, which is official CDC epidemiological software. The data is educational sample data derived from Epi Info 7's built-in EColi.prj sample project and is not from a real outbreak investigation. The task requires creating a bar chart (epidemic curve) showing illness onset date distribution for ill individuals.
